title: Huawei SFP-10G-LR-eKit, SFP+ optical module, Single-Mode, 10km, 10G, LC
category: Optical networks / SFP optical modules / SFP+
description: Huawei SFP-10G-LR-eKit is a single-mode SFP+ module with a maximum throughput of 10Gbps , 1310nm wavelength and two LC connectors for connection up to a distance of 10km . The module has built-in digital diagnostic functions (DDMI) including monitoring of optical power, voltage, temperature or other key parameters
specsSearch: Optics Format SFP+ For cable type Single Mode Transmission speed 10 Gbps Wavelength - Tx/Rx [nm] 1310 Distance [km] 10 Transfer type 2-fiber Tx power [dBm] 8,2 up to 0,5 Receiver sensitivity [dBm] 12,6 Connectors and Interfaces Optical Connectors (2) LC Physical characteristics Operating temperature [°C] 0 up to 70 General Compatibility Universal
